evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Design clean, reliable, and well-documented data models as a single source of truth
evidence.domain_risk: Own and evolve core business metrics - from definition to tracking and operationalisation
evidence.data_team_maturity: Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and data marts using modern tooling
evidence.jd_authorship: Conduct analyses to uncover insights and inform strategic decisions
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Own and evolve core business metrics - from definition to tracking and operationalisation; Develop the data and analytics components of the AI stack to support experimentation and GenAI applications
evidence.autonomy_level: Own and evolve core business metrics - from definition to tracking and operationalisation
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and data marts using modern tooling

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Design clean, reliable, and well-documented data models as a single source of truth
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: The JD emphasizes reliability, documentation quality, and governance (single source of truth) with no velocity-oriented language like "fast-paced" or "ship quickly".
domain_risk_quote: Own and evolve core business metrics - from definition to tracking and operationalisation
domain_risk_reasoning: While Getsafe operates in the regulated insurance sector, the JD frames the role as business analytics without explicitly invoking financial reporting, compliance, or regulatory consequences.
data_team_maturity_quote: Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and data marts using modern tooling
data_team_maturity_reasoning: The emphasis on maintaining and scaling existing infrastructure with named tools (dbt, Metabase) indicates a maturing team with established but evolving systems, not a greenfield build or fully mature specialized division.
jd_authorship_quote: Conduct analyses to uncover insights and inform strategic decisions
jd_authorship_reasoning: Most responsibilities use generic boilerplate action verbs that could apply to any analytics role; while AI/GenAI applications are mentioned, there are no scale numbers, specific metrics, or precise tool application contexts typical of hiring-manager authorship.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Own and evolve core business metrics - from definition to tracking and operationalisation; Develop the data and analytics components of the AI stack to support experimentation and GenAI applications
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The first two responsibilities equally emphasize business metric ownership and product/engineering AI enablement, with no clear primary audience across the responsibilities section.
autonomy_level_quote: Own and evolve core business metrics - from definition to tracking and operationalisation
autonomy_level_reasoning: The verb 'own' combined with 'from definition to tracking' indicates end-to-end ownership and the autonomy to define and shape how core metrics are structured and evolved, rather than executing direction from others.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and data marts using modern tooling
greenfield_vs_fix_reasoning: Both build/design (new work) and maintain/evolve/scale (existing systems) verbs present without clear dominance.
ai_role_quote: Develop the data and analytics components of the AI stack to support experimentation and GenAI applications
ai_role_reasoning: Candidate builds data infrastructure components that AI/GenAI applications consume.
testing_framing_quote: Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and data marts using modern tooling
testing_framing_reasoning: Operational responsibilities stated without explicit testing ownership or quality practice verbs.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Design clean, reliable, and well-documented data models as a single source of truth
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Reliability and trustworthiness framed as operational concerns, not compliance/regulatory dominance.
